arts.ttl: Crystal Palace v Brighton, West Ham v Bournemouth and more: football – live
arts.sum: Updates from the Premier League and beyond Live scoreboard | Read Football Daily | Mail Dominic Meanwhile, the top of League Two is madness. Port Vale are on the brink of a 3-2 win at Walsall that would take them to the summit, leapfrogging the hosts, while Doncaster conjured up two goals in the final few minutes at Cheltenham to win 2-0 and boost their hopes of automatic promotion. Full time: Luton 1-1 Leeds, Coventry 1-2 Burnley. Sunderland still lead with a couple of minutes to go at The Hawthorns. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Barcelona captain Marc-Andre ter Stegen opens up on separation from wife and media reporting
arts.sum: Barcelona captain Marc-Andre ter Stegen has explained that the damage done by the reporting of his separation from wife Dani ter Stegen (nee Jehle) remains irreparable. The German goalkeeper announced his parting of ways from Dani in March, and asked for privacy, but shortly after, it was reported that the motive was Jehle’s unfaithfulness. During […] The post Barcelona captain Marc-Andre ter Stegen opens up on separation from wife and media reporting appeared first on Football España.
Manchester United's Jadon Sancho a target for Wolves, Sporting lower Viktor Gyokeres asking price and Arsenal cool interest in Newcastle striker Alexander Isak.

arts.ttl: The Big Question: Can Ipswich pull off a great escape?
arts.sum: A period of eight defeats – including one that provided the rarest of Southampton wins – and two draws from 10 matches appeared to point at an immediate return to the Championship for Ipswich. Victory would cut the deficit to six points [albeit with an inferior goal difference] to Vitor Pereira ’s side, as well as providing successive Premier League wins for the first time in a tough campaign.
